name: com.unity.project-auditor-rules
description: Project Auditor is a static analysis tool that analyzes assets, settings, and scripts inside Unity projects. Project Auditor lives inside the Unity Editor as a module, and uses the rules in this package to provide suggestions for improvement.

_upm.changelog:
# Fixed
* Recognize Array.Clear as a valid reset method, and do not log delayCall issues in the Domain Reload Roslyn Analyzer.
